description: 17. Get all lists for a site
name: sigsci-get-all-site-lists

outputs.description: The name of the list in Signal Sciences. SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.Type The type of the list in Signal Sciences.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.Name

outputs.description: The entry list of the list in Signal Sciences. SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.ID The ID of the list in Signal Sciences.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.Entries

outputs.description: The description of the list in Signal Sciences. Maximum is 140 characters. SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.CreatedBy The creator of the list in Signal Sciences.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.Description

outputs.description: The creation date of the list in Signal Sciences. SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.UpdatedDate The last update date of the list in Signal Sciences.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.List.CreatedDate
